prompt: 请根据新证据更新这个项目 wiki，并只补充必要的生命周期说明，避免写成重流程系统。
checks: identifies impacted page types or target files
ties the update to explicit local evidence
uses lightweight lifecycle markers such as review_status or consolidation_status only when helpful
keeps supersession or retention notes narrow and justified
preserves an incremental update posture instead of broad rewrites
